summary: Unhandled TypeError when video_duration is a string type instead of integer
failure_scenario: When ContentCatalog.content_metadata contains {"duration": "3600"} (string from JSON), and a prior watch record exists (second+ watch on same assignment): validate_position_bounds gracefully converts to int with try/except, but validate_rate_check performs raw division (video_duration / RATE_MULTIPLIER_LIMIT) at line 174, raising TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for /: 'str' and 'int'. This crashes with 500 Internal Server Error instead of silently rejecting with verified=false, violating the 'silent rejection' pattern (AC5).
